Near the intersection of Skyland Drive and Tamarack road. There are trails (all part of Ramapo Mountain State Forest) all on the Tamarack side of the road which are loaded with blueberries Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: July-August.

Go to the far end of the big field at Weis Ecology Center(formerly Camp Midvale). There are clusters of wineberry bushes on the northwest side along a trail leading into the woods. They normally ripen in mid-July. This is Green Acres land and open to the publi
